This combined condition forms the antecedent of an implication: `inspiratoryPause & inspClock_greaterThanOrEqual_inspiratoryTime`. The phrase "the cycle shall proceed immediately to expiration" means that the `expiratoryPhaseStart` atomic proposition must become true in the very next state. This is captured by the `X` (next) operator: `X expiratoryPhaseStart`. The "When X, Y" structure implies that this rule must hold globally throughout the system's operation, so the entire implication is wrapped by the `G` (globally) operator. Thus, the final formula is G((inspiratoryPause & inspClock_greaterThanOrEqual_inspiratoryTime) -> X expiratoryPhaseStart).
